ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sarah Brooks appeared by zoom for Jonathan Powell.

The court stated that it agrees that the amended petition should be treated as a supplement to the petition. The court waives the defect in publication. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Continued To Jul-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
